note: PR A placeholder catalog — 3 work types. Phase 2.x PR-1: per-item scenarios/mitigations/ppe. v0.3.0: i18n fields (en/vi/th/id) added. regulation 인용은 felix 검수 필요.

CVD_PM.label_vi: Bảo trì phòng ngừa (PM) buồng CVD
CVD_PM.label_th: งานบำรุงรักษาเชิงป้องกัน (PM) ห้อง CVD

baseline.content: 전원·RF·가스 LOTO 시행 및 잔류전압 검전
baseline.content_en: Apply LOTO to power, RF, and gas sources; verify zero residual voltage
baseline.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO cho nguồn điện, RF và khí; kiểm tra điện áp dư bằng 0
baseline.content_th: ดำเนินการ LOTO กับแหล่งจ่ายไฟ, RF และก๊าซ; ตรวจสอบแรงดันคงค้างเป็นศูนย์
baseline.content_id: Terapkan LOTO pada sumber daya listrik, RF, dan gas; verifikasi tegangan sisa nol

scenarios.content: RF 라인 LOTO 누락 상태에서 챔버 개방 → 감전
scenarios.content_en: Opening chamber while RF line LOTO is missed → electric shock
scenarios.content_vi: Mở buồng khi chưa LOTO đường RF → điện giật
scenarios.content_th: เปิดห้องขณะที่ยังไม่ได้ LOTO สาย RF → ไฟฟ้าช็อต
scenarios.content_id: Membuka chamber saat LOTO jalur RF terlewat → tersengat listrik

mitigations.content: 전원·RF·가스 3 분야 개별 LOTO + 검전기로 잔류전압 0V 확인
mitigations.content_en: Apply individual LOTO to all three (power/RF/gas) and verify 0 V residual voltage with a voltage tester
mitigations.content_vi: Áp dụng LOTO riêng cho cả ba (điện/RF/khí) và xác nhận điện áp dư 0 V bằng đồng hồ đo điện áp
mitigations.content_th: ดำเนินการ LOTO แยกสำหรับทั้งสามแหล่ง (ไฟฟ้า/RF/ก๊าซ) และยืนยันแรงดันคงค้าง 0 V ด้วยเครื่องวัดแรงดัน
mitigations.content_id: Terapkan LOTO terpisah untuk ketiga sumber (listrik/RF/gas) dan verifikasi tegangan sisa 0 V dengan voltage tester

ppe.content_th: ถุงมือฉนวนไฟฟ้า

baseline.content: 프로세스가스(SiH4·NH3 등) 라인 퍼지 완료 — 잔류농도 측정
baseline.content_en: Complete purge of process-gas lines (SiH4, NH3, etc.) and measure residual concentration
baseline.content_vi: Hoàn tất xả sạch (purge) đường khí công nghệ (SiH4, NH3, v.v.) và đo nồng độ dư
baseline.content_th: ดำเนินการ purge สายก๊าซกระบวนการ (SiH4, NH3 ฯลฯ) ให้สมบูรณ์ และวัดความเข้มข้นคงค้าง
baseline.content_id: Selesaikan purging jalur gas proses (SiH4, NH3, dll.) dan ukur konsentrasi sisa
baseline.regulation: 추정: SEMI S2 §17, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 퍼지 미완료 상태 챔버 개방으로 SiH4 자연발화
scenarios.content_en: Opening chamber with incomplete purge causes pyrophoric ignition of SiH4
scenarios.content_vi: Mở buồng khi chưa hoàn tất purge khiến SiH4 tự bốc cháy
scenarios.content_th: เปิดห้องขณะที่ยังไม่ purge เสร็จ ทำให้ SiH4 ลุกไหม้เอง (pyrophoric)
scenarios.content_id: Membuka chamber dengan purging belum selesai menyebabkan SiH4 terbakar spontan (piroforik)

mitigations.content: N2 퍼지 3회 이상 + 잔류농도 5ppm 미만 확인 후 개방
mitigations.content_en: Perform N2 purge at least 3 cycles and confirm residual concentration < 5 ppm before opening
mitigations.content_vi: Thực hiện purge N2 ít nhất 3 chu kỳ và xác nhận nồng độ dư < 5 ppm trước khi mở
mitigations.content_th: ดำเนินการ purge ด้วย N2 อย่างน้อย 3 รอบ และยืนยันความเข้มข้นคงค้าง < 5 ppm ก่อนเปิด
mitigations.content_id: Lakukan purging N2 minimal 3 siklus dan konfirmasi konsentrasi sisa < 5 ppm sebelum membuka

ppe.content_vi: Máy đo khí cầm tay (SiH4/NH3 + O2)
ppe.content_th: เครื่องตรวจวัดก๊าซแบบพกพา (SiH4/NH3 + O2)

baseline.content: PFC(증착부산물) 다량 챔버 개방 시 방독마스크/SCBA 착용
baseline.content_en: Wear gas mask or SCBA when opening a chamber with heavy PFC (deposition byproduct) load
baseline.content_vi: Đeo mặt nạ phòng độc hoặc SCBA khi mở buồng có nhiều PFC (sản phẩm phụ lắng đọng)
baseline.content_th: สวมหน้ากากป้องกันแก๊สหรือ SCBA เมื่อต้องเปิดห้องที่มี PFC (สารพลอยได้จากการพอกพูน) จำนวนมาก
baseline.content_id: Kenakan masker gas atau SCBA saat membuka chamber dengan banyak PFC (produk samping deposisi)
baseline.regulation: 추정: SEMI F-40, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: PFC 다량 노출로 호흡기 자극 또는 만성 노출 우려
scenarios.content_en: Heavy PFC exposure may cause respiratory irritation or chronic exposure risk
scenarios.content_vi: Phơi nhiễm PFC nhiều có thể gây kích ứng đường hô hấp hoặc nguy cơ phơi nhiễm mãn tính
scenarios.content_th: การสัมผัส PFC ปริมาณมากอาจก่อให้เกิดการระคายเคืองทางเดินหายใจหรือเสี่ยงสัมผัสเรื้อรัง
scenarios.content_id: Paparan PFC dalam jumlah besar dapat menyebabkan iritasi saluran pernapasan atau risiko paparan kronis

mitigations.content: PFC 농도 측정 후 임계 초과 시 SCBA 의무 + 작업시간 제한
mitigations.content_en: Measure PFC concentration; if it exceeds the threshold, SCBA is mandatory and working time is limited
mitigations.content_vi: Đo nồng độ PFC; nếu vượt ngưỡng, bắt buộc dùng SCBA và giới hạn thời gian làm việc
mitigations.content_th: วัดความเข้มข้น PFC; หากเกินค่าเกณฑ์ ต้องใส่ SCBA และจำกัดเวลาทำงาน
mitigations.content_id: Ukur konsentrasi PFC; jika melewati ambang batas, SCBA wajib dan waktu kerja dibatasi

ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ phòng độc hoặc SCBA
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากป้องกันแก๊สหรือ SCBA

baseline.content: 히터·라이너 잔열 확인(일정 온도 이하 강하 후 작업)
baseline.content_en: Verify residual heat on heater and liner; only work after cooldown below the specified temperature
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra nhiệt dư trên heater và liner; chỉ làm việc sau khi nhiệt độ hạ xuống dưới ngưỡng quy định
baseline.content_th: ตรวจสอบความร้อนคงค้างของ heater และ liner; เริ่มงานต่อเมื่ออุณหภูมิลดต่ำกว่าค่าที่กำหนด
baseline.content_id: Verifikasi panas sisa pada heater dan liner; mulai bekerja hanya setelah suhu turun di bawah ambang yang ditentukan
baseline.regulation: 추정: SEMI S2 §15, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 잔열 상태(60°C 이상) 라이너 접촉으로 화상
scenarios.content_en: Burn injury from contacting a liner still hot (above 60°C)
scenarios.content_vi: Bỏng do chạm vào liner còn nóng (trên 60°C)
scenarios.content_th: ผิวหนังไหม้จากการสัมผัส liner ที่ยังร้อน (สูงกว่า 60°C)
scenarios.content_id: Cedera luka bakar akibat menyentuh liner yang masih panas (di atas 60°C)

mitigations.content: 표면 온도 50°C 이하 강하 확인 후 진입 (적외선 측온계)
mitigations.content_en: Confirm surface temperature has dropped below 50°C using an IR thermometer before entry
mitigations.content_vi: Xác nhận nhiệt độ bề mặt đã hạ xuống dưới 50°C bằng nhiệt kế hồng ngoại trước khi vào
mitigations.content_th: ยืนยันอุณหภูมิพื้นผิวลดต่ำกว่า 50°C ด้วยเครื่องวัดอุณหภูมิอินฟราเรดก่อนเข้าทำงาน
mitigations.content_id: Konfirmasi suhu permukaan turun di bawah 50°C menggunakan termometer inframerah sebelum masuk

ppe.content_th: ถุงมือทนความร้อน

baseline.content: PM 작업 2인 1조 및 EHS 입회 확인
baseline.content_en: Confirm PM work is performed in a two-person team with EHS witness
baseline.content_vi: Xác nhận công việc PM được thực hiện theo tổ 2 người với sự chứng kiến của EHS
baseline.content_th: ยืนยันว่างาน PM ดำเนินการแบบทีม 2 คน พร้อมเจ้าหน้าที่ EHS ร่วมสังเกตการณ์
baseline.content_id: Konfirmasi pekerjaan PM dilakukan dalam tim 2 orang dengan saksi EHS
baseline.regulation: 추정: 사내 EHS 표준, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 단독 PM 작업 중 사고 발생 시 신속한 구조 어려움
scenarios.content_en: Difficult to rescue quickly if an accident occurs during solo PM work
scenarios.content_vi: Khó cứu hộ kịp thời nếu xảy ra sự cố khi làm PM một mình
scenarios.content_th: ยากต่อการช่วยเหลือทันทีหากเกิดอุบัติเหตุระหว่างทำงาน PM คนเดียว
scenarios.content_id: Sulit melakukan pertolongan cepat jika terjadi kecelakaan saat melakukan PM seorang diri

mitigations.content_en: Document two-person teaming (worker + watcher) and have EHS witness at least once
mitigations.content_vi: Văn bản hóa tổ 2 người (người làm + người giám sát) và có EHS chứng kiến ít nhất một lần
mitigations.content_th: ระบุเป็นเอกสารให้ทำงานแบบทีม 2 คน (ผู้ปฏิบัติงาน + ผู้สังเกตการณ์) และให้ EHS ร่วมสังเกตการณ์อย่างน้อย 1 ครั้ง
mitigations.content_id: Dokumentasikan kerja tim 2 orang (pekerja + pengawas) dan minta EHS menjadi saksi setidaknya sekali

add.content_en: Residual SiH4 detected — stop work immediately, ventilate, and re-purge
add.content_vi: Phát hiện SiH4 dư — dừng công việc ngay, thông gió và purge lại
add.content_th: ตรวจพบ SiH4 คงค้าง — หยุดงานทันที, ระบายอากาศ และ purge ซ้ำ
add.content_id: Sisa SiH4 terdeteksi — hentikan pekerjaan segera, ventilasi, dan lakukan purging ulang

GAS_LINE_BREAK.label_vi: Mở/cắt đường ống khí (Gas Line Break)
GAS_LINE_BREAK.label_th: งานตัด/เปิดท่อก๊าซ (Gas Line Break)

baseline.content: Chemical Line Break 허가서 발급 및 가스 종류·농도 명기
baseline.content_en: Issue a Chemical Line Break permit specifying gas type and concentration
baseline.content_vi: Cấp giấy phép Chemical Line Break, ghi rõ loại khí và nồng độ
baseline.content_th: ออกใบอนุญาต Chemical Line Break โดยระบุชนิดและความเข้มข้นของก๊าซ
baseline.content_id: Terbitkan izin Chemical Line Break dengan mencantumkan jenis dan konsentrasi gas

scenarios.content: 허가서 가스 종류 미특정으로 부적합 PPE 선택 → 노출
scenarios.content_en: Unspecified gas type on the permit leads to wrong PPE selection → exposure
scenarios.content_vi: Không xác định loại khí trên giấy phép dẫn đến chọn sai PPE → phơi nhiễm
scenarios.content_th: ไม่ระบุชนิดก๊าซในใบอนุญาตทำให้เลือก PPE ไม่ถูกต้อง → สัมผัสสารพิษ
scenarios.content_id: Jenis gas tidak ditentukan pada izin sehingga PPE yang dipilih salah → paparan

mitigations.content: 허가서에 가스 종류·농도·MSDS 번호 명기 후 PPE 매칭
mitigations.content_en: Specify gas type, concentration, and MSDS number on the permit, then match the PPE accordingly
mitigations.content_vi: Ghi rõ loại khí, nồng độ và số MSDS trên giấy phép, sau đó chọn PPE tương ứng
mitigations.content_th: ระบุชนิดก๊าซ, ความเข้มข้น และเลข MSDS ในใบอนุญาต แล้วเลือก PPE ให้สอดคล้อง
mitigations.content_id: Cantumkan jenis gas, konsentrasi, dan nomor MSDS pada izin, lalu sesuaikan PPE

baseline.content: 이중밸브 차단 + 잔압 배출 + 질소(N2) 퍼지 3회 이상
baseline.content_en: Double-block valve isolation + residual pressure bleed + N2 purge at least 3 cycles
baseline.content_vi: Khóa van kép + xả áp suất dư + purge N2 ít nhất 3 chu kỳ
baseline.content_th: ปิดวาล์วแบบ double-block + ระบายความดันคงค้าง + purge ด้วย N2 อย่างน้อย 3 รอบ
baseline.content_id: Isolasi double-block valve + buang tekanan sisa + purging N2 minimal 3 siklus
baseline.regulation: 추정: SEMI F-15, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 잔압/잔류가스 미배출 상태 플랜지 개방 → 가스 분출
scenarios.content_en: Opening the flange without bleeding residual pressure/gas → gas blowout
scenarios.content_vi: Mở mặt bích khi chưa xả áp/khí dư → khí phun ra mạnh
scenarios.content_th: เปิดหน้าแปลนโดยยังไม่ระบายความดัน/ก๊าซคงค้าง → ก๊าซพุ่งออก
scenarios.content_id: Membuka flange tanpa membuang tekanan/gas sisa → semburan gas

mitigations.content: 이중밸브 잠금 + 잔압 게이지 0 확인 + N2 퍼지 3회 후 개방
mitigations.content_en: Lock the double-block valves, confirm residual pressure gauge at 0, perform N2 purge 3 times, then open
mitigations.content_vi: Khóa van kép, xác nhận đồng hồ áp suất dư về 0, purge N2 3 lần rồi mới mở
mitigations.content_th: ล็อควาล์ว double-block, ยืนยันเกจวัดความดันคงค้างเป็น 0, purge N2 3 รอบ แล้วจึงเปิด
mitigations.content_id: Kunci double-block valve, konfirmasi indikator tekanan sisa di 0, lakukan purging N2 3 kali, baru buka

baseline.content: 독성가스 작업자 풀페이스 SCBA 착용 + 비상 SCBA 1조 추가 비치
baseline.content_en: Workers handling toxic gas wear full-face SCBA; an additional spare SCBA set is staged for emergency
baseline.content_vi: Người làm việc với khí độc đeo SCBA che mặt toàn phần; bố trí thêm 1 bộ SCBA dự phòng cho tình huống khẩn cấp
baseline.content_th: ผู้ปฏิบัติงานกับก๊าซพิษสวม SCBA แบบ full-face และจัดเตรียม SCBA สำรองอีก 1 ชุดสำหรับเหตุฉุกเฉิน
baseline.content_id: Pekerja yang menangani gas beracun mengenakan SCBA full-face; sediakan 1 set SCBA cadangan untuk keadaan darurat

scenarios.content: SCBA 결함 발생 시 백업 부재로 대피 지연
scenarios.content_en: Without a backup SCBA, evacuation is delayed when the primary SCBA fails
scenarios.content_vi: Không có SCBA dự phòng, việc sơ tán bị chậm khi SCBA chính hỏng
scenarios.content_th: หาก SCBA หลักขัดข้องและไม่มีชุดสำรอง การอพยพจะล่าช้า
scenarios.content_id: Tanpa SCBA cadangan, evakuasi tertunda saat SCBA utama bermasalah

mitigations.content: 작업자 SCBA + 비상 SCBA 1조 입구 비치 + 충전 상태 사전 확인
mitigations.content_en: Worker SCBA plus 1 emergency SCBA staged at the entry; pre-check charge status
mitigations.content_vi: SCBA cho người làm cộng 1 bộ SCBA khẩn cấp đặt ở lối vào; kiểm tra trạng thái nạp trước
mitigations.content_th: SCBA สำหรับผู้ปฏิบัติงานพร้อม SCBA ฉุกเฉินอีก 1 ชุดวางที่ทางเข้า; ตรวจสอบสถานะการชาร์จล่วงหน้า
mitigations.content_id: SCBA pekerja ditambah 1 set SCBA darurat di pintu masuk; periksa status pengisian sebelumnya

ppe.content_vi: SCBA che mặt toàn phần (đã nạp đầy)
ppe.content_th: SCBA แบบ full-face (ชาร์จเต็ม)

ppe.content_vi: Quần áo bảo hộ chống hóa chất
ppe.content_th: ชุดป้องกันสารเคมี

baseline.content: 휴대용 가스검지기(타깃 가스 + O2 + LEL) 지속 측정
baseline.content_en: Continuously monitor with a portable gas detector (target gas + O2 + LEL)
baseline.content_vi: Giám sát liên tục bằng máy đo khí cầm tay (khí mục tiêu + O2 + LEL)
baseline.content_th: ตรวจวัดต่อเนื่องด้วยเครื่องตรวจวัดก๊าซแบบพกพา (ก๊าซเป้าหมาย + O2 + LEL)
baseline.content_id: Pantau terus-menerus dengan detektor gas portabel (gas target + O2 + LEL)

scenarios.content: 가스 누출 미감지로 작업자 흡입 노출
scenarios.content_en: Undetected gas leak causes inhalation exposure to the worker
scenarios.content_vi: Không phát hiện được khí rò khiến người làm hít phải
scenarios.content_th: ตรวจไม่พบการรั่วของก๊าซทำให้ผู้ปฏิบัติงานสูดดมเข้าไป
scenarios.content_id: Kebocoran gas tidak terdeteksi menyebabkan pekerja menghirupnya

mitigations.content: 타깃 가스 + O2 + LEL 3 채널 검지기 작업 내내 가동
mitigations.content_en: Keep a 3-channel detector (target gas + O2 + LEL) running throughout the work
mitigations.content_vi: Duy trì hoạt động máy đo 3 kênh (khí mục tiêu + O2 + LEL) suốt quá trình làm việc
mitigations.content_th: เปิดเครื่องตรวจ 3 ช่องสัญญาณ (ก๊าซเป้าหมาย + O2 + LEL) ตลอดการทำงาน
mitigations.content_id: Jalankan detektor 3-kanal (gas target + O2 + LEL) sepanjang pekerjaan

ppe.content_vi: Máy đo đa khí cầm tay
ppe.content_th: เครื่องตรวจวัดก๊าซหลายชนิดแบบพกพา

baseline.content: 비상샤워·세안기 위치 확인, 비상통신 무전 채널 점검
baseline.content_en: Verify emergency shower and eyewash locations; check emergency radio channel
baseline.content_vi: Xác nhận vị trí vòi sen khẩn cấp và bồn rửa mắt; kiểm tra kênh bộ đàm khẩn cấp
baseline.content_th: ยืนยันตำแหน่งฝักบัวฉุกเฉินและที่ล้างตา; ตรวจสอบช่องวิทยุสื่อสารฉุกเฉิน
baseline.content_id: Verifikasi lokasi safety shower dan eyewash; periksa kanal radio darurat
baseline.regulation: 추정: SEMI S6, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 약품 비산 시 비상샤워 위치 미숙지로 응급 대응 지연
scenarios.content_en: Unfamiliarity with emergency shower location delays response in case of chemical splash
scenarios.content_vi: Không nắm rõ vị trí vòi sen khẩn cấp khi hóa chất bắn vào, gây chậm ứng phó
scenarios.content_th: ไม่ทราบตำแหน่งฝักบัวฉุกเฉินเมื่อสารเคมีกระเด็นใส่ ทำให้ตอบสนองล่าช้า
scenarios.content_id: Tidak hafal lokasi safety shower saat tumpahan kimia menyebabkan respons darurat tertunda

mitigations.content: 작업 시작 직전 비상샤워·세안기 위치 1:1 인지 + 무전 1회 통화 시험
mitigations.content_en: Right before starting, walk each worker through the shower/eyewash location and run one radio test call
mitigations.content_vi: Ngay trước khi bắt đầu, hướng dẫn 1:1 vị trí vòi sen/bồn rửa mắt và thử gọi bộ đàm 1 lần
mitigations.content_th: ก่อนเริ่มงาน ชี้แนะตำแหน่งฝักบัว/ที่ล้างตาแบบ 1:1 และทดสอบสื่อสารทางวิทยุ 1 ครั้ง
mitigations.content_id: Sesaat sebelum mulai, panduan 1:1 ke lokasi shower/eyewash dan lakukan satu kali tes panggilan radio

add.content: HF/BOE — 칼슘글루코네이트 젤 비치 및 작업자 사전 사용법 숙지
add.content_en: HF/BOE — stage calcium gluconate gel and brief workers on its use beforehand
add.content_vi: HF/BOE — bố trí gel calcium gluconate và phổ biến trước cho người làm cách sử dụng
add.content_th: HF/BOE — เตรียมเจล calcium gluconate และอบรมวิธีใช้ให้ผู้ปฏิบัติงานล่วงหน้า
add.content_id: HF/BOE — siapkan gel kalsium glukonat dan beri pengarahan cara penggunaan kepada pekerja sebelumnya
add.regulation: 추정: 사내 화학물질 SOP, felix 검수 필요

LITHO_PM.label_vi: Bảo trì phòng ngừa (PM) thiết bị Lithography
LITHO_PM.label_th: งานบำรุงรักษาเชิงป้องกัน (PM) เครื่อง Lithography

baseline.content: 광원(DUV/EUV) 셔터 차단 및 전원 LOTO
baseline.content_en: Close the light-source (DUV/EUV) shutter and apply power LOTO
baseline.content_vi: Đóng shutter nguồn sáng (DUV/EUV) và áp dụng LOTO nguồn điện
baseline.content_th: ปิดชัตเตอร์แหล่งกำเนิดแสง (DUV/EUV) และดำเนินการ LOTO ไฟฟ้า
baseline.content_id: Tutup shutter sumber cahaya (DUV/EUV) dan terapkan LOTO sumber daya
baseline.regulation: 추정: SEMI S2 §10, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 셔터 미차단 상태 챔버 개방 시 광원 노출 → 안구 부상
scenarios.content_en: Opening chamber while shutter is not closed exposes worker to the light source → eye injury
scenarios.content_vi: Mở buồng khi shutter chưa đóng làm phơi nhiễm nguồn sáng → tổn thương mắt
scenarios.content_th: เปิดห้องขณะที่ชัตเตอร์ยังไม่ปิดทำให้สัมผัสแหล่งกำเนิดแสง → บาดเจ็บที่ดวงตา
scenarios.content_id: Membuka chamber saat shutter belum tertutup menyebabkan paparan sumber cahaya → cedera mata

mitigations.content: 셔터 차단 인터록 확인 + 전원 LOTO 후 챔버 진입
mitigations.content_en: Verify shutter-closed interlock and apply power LOTO before entering the chamber
mitigations.content_vi: Xác nhận interlock shutter đã đóng và áp dụng LOTO nguồn điện trước khi vào buồng
mitigations.content_th: ยืนยันอินเตอร์ล็อกชัตเตอร์ปิด และดำเนินการ LOTO ไฟฟ้าก่อนเข้าห้อง
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi interlock shutter tertutup dan terapkan LOTO daya sebelum masuk chamber

ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ chắn bức xạ nguồn sáng (cấp DUV/EUV)
ppe.content_th: แว่นนิรภัยกันแสงระดับแหล่งกำเนิด (เกรด DUV/EUV)

baseline.content: 포토레지스트·현상액 누출 확인 및 보호장갑·보안경 착용
baseline.content_en: Check for photoresist/developer leaks and wear protective gloves and goggles
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra rò rỉ photoresist/dung dịch hiện hình và mang găng tay bảo hộ, kính bảo hộ
baseline.content_th: ตรวจการรั่วของ photoresist/น้ำยา developer และสวมถุงมือป้องกันและแว่นนิรภัย
baseline.content_id: Periksa kebocoran photoresist/developer dan kenakan sarung tangan pelindung dan kacamata

scenarios.content: 현상액(TMAH) 피부 접촉 시 화학 화상
scenarios.content_en: Skin contact with developer (TMAH) causes chemical burns
scenarios.content_vi: Da tiếp xúc với dung dịch hiện hình (TMAH) gây bỏng hóa học
scenarios.content_th: ผิวหนังสัมผัสน้ำยา developer (TMAH) ทำให้เกิดแผลไหม้เคมี
scenarios.content_id: Kontak kulit dengan developer (TMAH) menyebabkan luka bakar kimia

mitigations.content: 내화학 장갑 + 보안경 착용 + 누출 시 비상샤워 절차 숙지
mitigations.content_en: Wear chemical-resistant gloves and goggles and know the emergency shower procedure for any leak
mitigations.content_vi: Đeo găng tay chống hóa chất và kính bảo hộ; nắm rõ quy trình vòi sen khẩn cấp khi rò rỉ
mitigations.content_th: สวมถุงมือทนสารเคมีและแว่นนิรภัย และเรียนรู้ขั้นตอนฝักบัวฉุกเฉินเมื่อเกิดการรั่ว
mitigations.content_id: Kenakan sarung tangan tahan kimia dan kacamata, serta pahami prosedur safety shower jika terjadi kebocoran

ppe.content_vi: Găng tay chống hóa chất (nitrile hoặc butyl)
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือทนสารเคมี (nitrile หรือ butyl)
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan tahan kimia (nitril atau butil)

ppe.content_th: แว่นนิรภัย

baseline.content: EUV 진공 챔버 개방 전 압력 평형 + 수은램프 잔열 확인
baseline.content_en: Before opening the EUV vacuum chamber, equalize pressure and verify residual heat on the mercury lamp
baseline.content_vi: Trước khi mở buồng chân không EUV, cân bằng áp suất và kiểm tra nhiệt dư của đèn thủy ngân
baseline.content_th: ก่อนเปิดห้องสุญญากาศ EUV ต้องปรับความดันให้สมดุล และตรวจสอบความร้อนคงค้างของหลอดปรอท
baseline.content_id: Sebelum membuka chamber vakum EUV, samakan tekanan dan verifikasi panas sisa pada lampu merkuri
baseline.regulation: 추정: SEMI S2 §15, felix 검수 필요

scenarios.content: 압력 미평형 상태 챔버 개방으로 진공 흡입력 부상
scenarios.content_en: Opening chamber without pressure equalization causes injury from vacuum suction force
scenarios.content_vi: Mở buồng khi áp suất chưa cân bằng có thể gây chấn thương do lực hút chân không
scenarios.content_th: เปิดห้องขณะความดันยังไม่สมดุลทำให้เกิดบาดเจ็บจากแรงดูดสุญญากาศ
scenarios.content_id: Membuka chamber saat tekanan belum seimbang menyebabkan cedera akibat gaya isap vakum

mitigations.content: 압력 게이지 대기압 도달 + 수은램프 표면 50°C 이하 후 개방
mitigations.content_en: Open only after the pressure gauge reaches atmospheric pressure and the mercury lamp surface is below 50°C
mitigations.content_vi: Chỉ mở sau khi đồng hồ áp suất đạt áp suất khí quyển và bề mặt đèn thủy ngân dưới 50°C
mitigations.content_th: เปิดต่อเมื่อเกจวัดความดันถึงระดับบรรยากาศและพื้นผิวหลอดปรอทต่ำกว่า 50°C
mitigations.content_id: Buka hanya setelah indikator tekanan mencapai tekanan atmosfer dan permukaan lampu merkuri di bawah 50°C

baseline.content: 방사선 안전관리(EUV 부수 X-ray) 출입자 등록
baseline.content_en: Register entrants under radiation safety management (incidental X-ray from EUV)
baseline.content_vi: Đăng ký người ra vào theo quản lý an toàn bức xạ (tia X phụ phát sinh từ EUV)
baseline.content_th: ลงทะเบียนผู้เข้าออกตามการจัดการความปลอดภัยรังสี (X-ray ที่เกิดร่วมกับ EUV)
baseline.content_id: Daftarkan personel masuk dalam manajemen keselamatan radiasi (sinar-X insidental dari EUV)

scenarios.content: 출입자 미등록으로 방사선 누적 노출 추적 불가
scenarios.content_en: Without entry registration, cumulative radiation exposure cannot be tracked
scenarios.content_vi: Không đăng ký người ra vào dẫn đến không truy vết được phơi nhiễm bức xạ tích lũy
scenarios.content_th: ไม่ลงทะเบียนผู้เข้าออกทำให้ไม่สามารถติดตามปริมาณรังสีสะสมได้
scenarios.content_id: Tanpa pendaftaran personel masuk, paparan radiasi kumulatif tidak dapat dilacak

mitigations.content: 출입자별 TLD 배지 + 출입 로그 기록
mitigations.content_en: Issue a TLD badge per entrant and keep an entry log
mitigations.content_vi: Cấp huy hiệu TLD cho từng người và ghi nhật ký ra vào
mitigations.content_th: ออกป้าย TLD ให้ผู้เข้าออกแต่ละคน และบันทึก log การเข้าออก
mitigations.content_id: Berikan badge TLD per personel dan catat log akses

ppe.content_vi: Huy hiệu đo phơi nhiễm bức xạ TLD
ppe.content_th: ป้ายวัดปริมาณรังสี TLD

conditional.if: special_notes contains EUV 광원 교체 OR special_notes contains 미러 교체

add.content: EUV 광원·미러 교체 시 — 광원 차단 인터록 LOTO 적용 + Sn 잔류 X-ray 검사 후 진입
add.content_en: When replacing the EUV source or mirror — apply LOTO to the light-source shutoff interlock and perform an X-ray inspection for Sn residue before entry
add.content_vi: Khi thay nguồn EUV/gương — áp dụng LOTO cho interlock cắt nguồn sáng và kiểm tra X-ray dư lượng Sn trước khi vào
add.content_th: เมื่อเปลี่ยนแหล่งกำเนิด EUV หรือกระจก — ดำเนินการ LOTO กับอินเตอร์ล็อกตัดแหล่งกำเนิดแสง และตรวจ X-ray หาคราบ Sn ก่อนเข้า
add.content_id: Saat mengganti sumber EUV atau cermin — terapkan LOTO pada interlock pemutus sumber cahaya dan lakukan pemeriksaan X-ray untuk residu Sn sebelum masuk

add.content: 과거 방사선·노출 이력 — TLD 분기점검 + 출입자별 누적선량 5mSv/연 미만 한도 사전 확인
add.content_en: Past radiation/exposure history — perform quarterly TLD review and confirm each entrant's cumulative dose is below the 5 mSv/year limit beforehand
add.content_vi: Có tiền sử bức xạ/phơi nhiễm — kiểm tra TLD hằng quý và xác nhận trước rằng liều tích lũy của mỗi người dưới giới hạn 5 mSv/năm
add.content_th: มีประวัติรังสี/การสัมผัสในอดีต — ตรวจสอบ TLD รายไตรมาส และยืนยันล่วงหน้าว่าปริมาณรังสีสะสมของผู้เข้าออกแต่ละคนต่ำกว่า 5 mSv/ปี
add.content_id: Riwayat radiasi/paparan sebelumnya — lakukan tinjauan TLD triwulanan dan konfirmasi sebelumnya bahwa dosis kumulatif tiap personel di bawah batas 5 mSv/tahun
